scope_goal: Tighten the feat-commands handoff so the submitted scope is limited to src/qual/commands/** plus the explicitly approved shared tests.
tasks_completed: Added the command catalog surface and supporting lookup helpers under src/qual/commands/**.
Hardened diff-preview output contracts so the fingerprint covers the exact emitted payload.
Added focused coverage for the command catalog and diff-preview contract paths.
Regenerated the handoff packet and lane metadata so the review evidence matches the owned command scope and approved shared tests.
roadmap_items: Milestone 3 - Product Readiness (Planned): keep the feat-commands handoff packet aligned with the owned command-contract changes and approved shared tests.
vision_capabilities: 3. Auditable generation - the emitted fingerprint verifies the exact diff payload users receive.
4. Operator-first control surface - CLI review gates stay aligned with the command-contract surface and approved shared tests.
routing_provider_impact: None. This change only affects local packet metadata and command-contract test coverage; no routing/provider files change.
kickoff_budget_note: Stayed within the default lane budget. The submitted scope is 6 files total: 4 command files and 2 shared tests.
approved_exception_note: Approved shared-file exception for tests/unit/test_commands_catalog.py and tests/unit/test_diff_preview.py.
